author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: spmm_csr_f32/f64, sparse_matmul_f32/f64, csr_to_coo_f32/f64, coo_to_csr_f32/f64, csr_to_csc_f32/f64, dense_to_sparse_csr_f32/f64, sparse_to_dense_csr_f32/f64, csc_to_dense_f32/f64. Analogous to the cuSPARSE path in ferrotorch-gpu (P2-P3/#806). On MPS use MPSGraph sparse matmul nodes (macOS 13+) or custom CSR SpMM MSL.
